responsibilities.name: Product Design & Iteration
responsibilities.description: Own the design of complex mechanical sub-assemblies from concept to production, using CAD software (SolidWorks/NX) to create detailed 3D models and 2D drawings.

responsibilities.name: DFM/DFA Optimization
responsibilities.description: Apply Design for Manufacturing and Assembly principles to reduce part count and cost, working closely with vendors on injection molding, casting, and machining limitations.

responsibilities.name: Prototyping & Validation
responsibilities.description: Build and test functional prototypes using 3D printing or CNC machining; design and execute test plans (drop tests, thermal cycling) to validate hardware reliability.

responsibilities.name: Tolerance Analysis
responsibilities.description: Perform detailed tolerance stack-up analysis to ensure fit and function across mass-produced components.

responsibilities.name: Cross-functional Collaboration
responsibilities.description: Work with Electrical and Firmware teams to ensure seamless integration of PCBAs and sensors into mechanical enclosures.

responsibilities.name: Global NPI Strategy
responsibilities.description: Lead the New Product Introduction (NPI) strategy for a major product line, managing the transition from Engineering Validation to Mass Production at global scale.

responsibilities.name: Supply Chain Engineering
responsibilities.description: Identify and qualify tier-1 global suppliers; lead technical negotiations and audit manufacturing facilities to ensure quality and scalability.

responsibilities.name: Root Cause Leadership
responsibilities.description: Act as the final technical authority on high-priority field failures or production line stoppers, leading Tiger Teams to solve complex multi-disciplinary issues.

responsibilities.name: Risk Mitigation
responsibilities.description: Conduct high-level FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) to identify and mitigate technical and schedule risks long before they impact the bottom line.

responsibilities.name: Architecture Review
responsibilities.description: Review and approve mechanical and system architectures for future product generations, ensuring they meet long-term sustainability and cost targets.

responsibilities.name: Design System Governance
responsibilities.description: Lead the evolution of the global design system, ensuring components are accessible, documented, and reusable across web and mobile platforms.

responsibilities.name: High-Fidelity Prototyping
responsibilities.description: Create complex, interactive prototypes that simulate real product logic to validate ideas before engineering begins.

responsibilities.name: Cross-Functional Strategy
responsibilities.description: Partner with Product Managers and Engineers to define the product roadmap, advocating for the user while respecting technical constraints.

responsibilities.name: User Research Integration
responsibilities.description: Translate qualitative user feedback and quantitative data (A/B test results) into polished, high-performing interface solutions.

responsibilities.name: Design Mentorship
responsibilities.description: Conduct design reviews and mentor junior designers to maintain a high bar for visual and interaction quality across the team.

responsibilities.name: Structural & Hydrodynamic Analysis
responsibilities.description: Lead complex simulations (using OrcaFlex or ANSYS) for wave-structure interaction, mooring stability, and riser fatigue.

responsibilities.name: Offshore Installation Leadership
responsibilities.description: Act as the primary technical authority on-site during high-stakes deployments, managing vessel operations and subsea hardware installation.

responsibilities.name: Regulatory & Safety Compliance
responsibilities.description: Ensure all designs meet international maritime standards (ABS, DNV, API) and manage environmental impact assessments for offshore projects.

responsibilities.name: Budget & Vendor Management
responsibilities.description: Oversee multi-million dollar CAPEX budgets and coordinate with global shipyards and fabrication partners.

responsibilities.name: Technological Innovation
responsibilities.description: Spearhead R&D initiatives for autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) or floating renewable energy platforms.

responsibilities.name: Architecture Design
responsibilities.description: Define the long-term data strategy, moving from monolithic warehouses to modern architectures like Data Mesh or Data Fabric.

responsibilities.name: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
responsibilities.description: Lead the deployment of scalable data infrastructure using Terraform, Kubernetes, and cloud-native services (AWS, Snowflake, Databricks).

responsibilities.name: Data Governance & Security
responsibilities.description: Establish enterprise-wide standards for data privacy (GDPR/CCPA), lineage, and metadata management.

responsibilities.name: Performance Optimization
responsibilities.description: Identify and resolve systemic bottlenecks in petabyte-scale pipelines, significantly reducing cloud compute costs (FinOps).

responsibilities.name: Technical Roadmap
responsibilities.description: Work with executive leadership to align data engineering efforts with core business KPIs and long-term scaling goals.

responsibilities.name: Full-Funnel Strategy
responsibilities.description: Develop and execute integrated marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, Paid Social, and Email to drive lead generation and revenue.

responsibilities.name: Brand Positioning
responsibilities.description: Define the brand voice and market positioning to differentiate the product in a crowded competitive landscape.

responsibilities.name: Performance Analytics
responsibilities.description: Own the marketing dashboard; use data to track ROAS, CAC, and LTV, making real-time pivots based on performance.

responsibilities.name: Content & Creative Direction
responsibilities.description: Oversee the creation of high-performing assets, from whitepapers and case studies to video ads and landing pages.

responsibilities.name: Growth Experimentation
responsibilities.description: Lead a culture of A/B testing across all channels to optimize conversion rates and user journeys.

responsibilities.name: Organizational Strategy
responsibilities.description: Align the company's learning programs with business growth goals, ensuring the workforce has the skills needed for future scaling.

responsibilities.name: EdTech Ecosystem Management
responsibilities.description: Select, implement, and manage the enterprise Learning Management System (LMS) and other educational tools.

responsibilities.name: Curriculum Architecture
responsibilities.description: Oversee the design of scalable training programs, ranging from executive leadership coaching to technical onboarding.

responsibilities.name: Measurement of ROI
responsibilities.description: Develop frameworks (like the Kirkpatrick Model) to measure the effectiveness of training and its impact on employee retention and productivity.

responsibilities.name: Stakeholder Management
responsibilities.description: Act as a strategic partner to C-suite executives to address skill gaps and drive organizational change management.
